use_cases: Displaying tech stack or partner logos in an animated semi-circle arrangement on landing pages
Creating an interactive brand showcase with hover tooltips revealing brand names
Showcasing supported integrations or connected platforms in a visually engaging hero section
Adding a dynamic visual element to SaaS landing pages that demonstrates ecosystem partnerships
Featuring social proof through animated brand logo displays with glass-morphism styling
ai_summary: A multi-orbit semi-circle component that displays icons arranged along a curved orbital path with glass-morphism styling and radial glow effects. Features dark mode support, hover tooltips, and smooth gradient backgrounds. Designed for showcasing tech stacks, partner logos, or integrations in hero sections with an interactive, modern aesthetic.
